cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus in Quarkus 3+ running on JDK 21), causing a compile-time 'package not found' error.

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (and thus not available in standard Jakarta EE 9+ runtimes like Quarkus on JDK 21), causing compile errors for missing classes.

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Migrate Java EE annotations to Jakarta EE namespace
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: javax.annotation and javax.enterprise packages are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Java 11+ to Java 21 migration context), causing compilation errors

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Replace deprecated EmbeddedEngine API with new DebeziumEngine API
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: EmbeddedEngine class and related configuration constants are removed or deprecated in newer Debezium versions, causing compilation errors

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Replace ManagedExecutorService with standard ExecutorService
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: javax.enterprise.concurrent.ManagedExecutorService is part of Java EE/Weld CDI which is being replaced by Jakarta CDI; standard Java concurrency is used instead

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Remove obsolete Debezium connector-specific imports and configuration
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: Specific connector classes like PostgresConnector and PostgresConnectorConfig are no longer needed with the generic DebeziumEngine API, and their removal cleans up unused code

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Remove obsolete Kafka storage import
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: MemoryOffsetBackingStore is no longer used in the new configuration approach

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Add MicroProfile Config for externalized configuration
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: New DebeziumEngine setup requires properties to be passed via Configuration.from(properties), necessitating a way to read config values

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Add Priority annotation for CDI observer method
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: Ensures the engine starts at the correct time in the application lifecycle with Jakarta CDI

cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.general_idea: Update shutdown method to handle ExecutorService and new Engine API
cache-invalidation/src/main/java/io/debe.why_exists: DebeziumEngine uses close() instead of stop(), and the new ExecutorService needs explicit shutdown
